headline: EOG Resources: Near-Term Boost From The Iran Conflict, But Fundamental Risks Are Rising (Rating Downgrade)
summary: EOG Resources is downgraded to a Hold, with current prices reflecting fair value and increased risk amid industry volatility. Click here to read my analysis.
